title: Proofmode
note: Open-source media provenance project used as a reference for portable capture, verification, decentralized preservation, C2PA support, and chain-of-custody alternatives.

title: guardianproject/proofmode-android
note: Public Android repository documenting Proofmode's GPL-licensed app, proof metadata, hashes, signatures, and design goals.

title: OpenArchive
note: Project source for Save, a free open-source mobile media archiving tool focused on privacy-preserving preservation.

title: OpenArchive GitHub organization
note: Public repositories for OpenArchive Save Android, Save iOS, and decentralized-web backend work.
